overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dusk walk through the Kabuki district. The player navigates from neon-lit streets down to a waterfront promenade, through covered food markets and narrow alleyways with dense cyberpunk architecture, holographic advertisements, and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street in Kabuki district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the street toward an intersection, passing pedestrians on both sides

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large green neon sign with 'KABUKI' text on building facade
pink neon hotel sign with arrow pointing left
string of red paper lanterns hanging across the street
dense network of electrical wires and pylons against the sky
industrial chimneys emitting smoke in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bustling cyberpunk street at dusk, dominated by the bright green Kabuki sign on the left and pink hotel signage on the right. Red lanterns hang overhead as the player walks toward an intersection, with moderate pedestrian traffic and distant industrial smokestacks visible against the hazy sky.

events.description: turns right at intersection toward stairwell entrance
descends metal stairs from street level to waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking down a metal staircase to a lower waterfront level

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with cartoon chef character and 'ALL FOODS' text
metal grate stairs with red railings descending to waterfront
metal safety railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The player turns right and descends a metal stairwell, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed vertical space. The All Foods billboard remains visible ahead while the Kabuki street recedes behind. Artificial lighting illuminates the metal grating steps as the waterfront level approaches.

events.description: emerges from stairs onto open waterfront promenade with water view
passes holographic vendor stall with glowing blue display

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with water to the left and neon skyline to the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind glowing holographic food cart

entered.detail: calm water reflecting the city lights and dusk sky
giant building-side holographic advertisements and corporate logos
safety railing separating walkway from water
food cart with bright blue holographic display and glowing elements

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the waterfront promenade, the scene opens to reveal a wide expanse of water on the left reflecting the massive holographic advertisements covering the distant skyscrapers. The player passes a vendor with a glowing blue holographic cart while walking along the concrete path, with sparse pedestrians sharing the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food market under overpass with neon-lit stalls

events.description: enters covered market area beneath overpass with food stalls
passes food stall with customers seated at counter eating

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market area, passing food stalls and browsing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: customers seated at food counter eating and conversing

entered.detail: open-air food stall with counter, stools, and bright fluorescent lighting
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging from stall awning
large concrete structural overpass forming a roof over the walkway
red and white automated vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered market area beneath a concrete overpass, where artificial neon lighting dominates. Food stalls with red paper lanterns line the right side, with customers seated at counters. The open waterfront view is replaced by enclosed urban infrastructure, creating an intimate market atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow waterfront alley with concrete walls and vending machines

events.description: exits covered market into narrow alleyway with concrete retaining wall
passes blue vending machines mounted on concrete wall

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alleyway, passing vending machines and trash bins along the concrete wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with graffiti and mounted fluorescent lights
blue automated vending machines with glowing displays
large green industrial dumpsters and trash containers

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market, the player enters a narrow alley defined by a high concrete retaining wall on the left lined with vending machines and trash bins. The path is tighter and more constrained, with occasional pedestrians passing in the opposite direction, while distant neon signs remain visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon street down to a constrained urban alleyway along the waterfront. It begins amidst the glow of green and pink signage and hanging red lanterns, moving through a crowded intersection toward a metal stairwell. As the camera descends the grating steps, the open street recedes and the scene opens onto a wide waterfront promenade where massive holographic advertisements reflect across the water. The perspective then shifts into a semi-covered market beneath a concrete overpass, replacing the open vista with the intimate glow of food stalls and neon lights. Finally, the path narrows as the camera exits the market and enters a tight alleyway defined by a high concrete wall and rows of vending machines.
